case_title: CCSF/ TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. KRISTOPHER SPOHN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $46.05 SERVED OCT-18-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SPOHN, KRISTOPHER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/ TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPOHN, KRISTOPHER $3,812.04 PRINCIPAL, $46.05 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,858.09 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTORS OFFICE REPRESENTED BY JOCELYN BROWN-DAVIS, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KRISTOPHER SPOHN IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS REVIEWED AND RETURNED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
